checks.label: portal automation env file is discoverable
checks.hint: Refresh the shared cache with npm run secrets:portal:sync, or set PORTAL_AUTOMATION_ENV_PATH.

checks.label: deploy target server is configured
checks.hint: Set WEBSITE_DEPLOY_SERVER or pass --server at deploy time.

checks.label: deploy SSH port is valid
checks.hint: Set WEBSITE_DEPLOY_PORT to an integer between 1 and 65535.

checks.label: deploy SSH key exists
checks.hint: Set WEBSITE_DEPLOY_KEY, create ~/.ssh/namecheap-portal, or add IdentityFile under Host monsoonfire in ~/.ssh/config.

checks.label: remote deploy path is configured
checks.hint: Set WEBSITE_DEPLOY_REMOTE_PATH when changing remote location.

checks.label: firebase web api key is configured or resolvable
checks.detail: Firebase web API key source: env.
checks.hint: Set VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY, PORTAL_FIREBASE_API_KEY, or FIREBASE_WEB_API_KEY, or ensure firebase-tools access to apps:sdkconfig.

checks.label: namecheap .htaccess template exists
.well-known asset exists (D:\tmp\mf-portal-firings-page\website\.well-known\apple-app-site-association)
.well-known asset exists (D:\tmp\mf-portal-firings-page\website\.well-known\assetlinks.json)
promotion gate staff email is present
checks.hint: Set PORTAL_STAFF_EMAIL or add email to the shared portal-agent-staff credentials file.

checks.label: promotion gate refresh-token staff credentials are present
checks.hint: Refresh the shared cache with npm run secrets:portal:sync, or provide PORTAL_AGENT_STAFF_CREDENTIALS_JSON / PORTAL_STAFF_REFRESH_TOKEN.

checks.label: promotion gate password fallback is present
checks.detail: No password fallback detected; default deploy path will use refresh-token auth.
checks.hint: PORTAL_STAFF_PASSWORD is optional and only needed for explicit password-ui diagnostics.

checks.label: promotion gate Firestore Rules API token is present
checks.hint: Set FIREBASE_RULES_API_TOKEN or refresh the local Firebase CLI login before backend regression/rules checks.

checks.label: promotion gate Firestore index deploy auth is configured
checks.detail: Index deploy auth detected via FIREBASE_TOKEN, GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, service-account JSON, or local Firebase CLI session.
checks.hint: Set FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_MONSOONFIRE_PORTAL (recommended), FIREBASE_TOKEN, or ensure local Firebase CLI login before deploy.

checks.label: agent staff credentials path exists
checks.hint: Refresh the shared cache with npm run secrets:portal:sync, or set PORTAL_AGENT_STAFF_CREDENTIALS to a readable JSON credentials file.

checks.label: agent staff credential file content is valid
checks.detail: Credential payload is parseable and complete.
checks.hint: Credential file must contain refreshToken, uid, and email.

authenticate staff account
staff home path resolves to the task-first landing
staff dedicated cockpit path resolves to cockpit workspace
staff dedicated workshops path resolves to workshops workspace
staff dedicated system path resolves to system workspace
staff path noise is canonicalized consistently
unknown staff paths recover to /staff
navigation dock controls switch left/top/right/bottom
navigation flyouts open in top/bottom docks
legacy requests deep links route to supported pages
dashboard piece click-through opens my pieces detail
continue journey runtime linkage (ui + firestore)
notifications mark read gives user feedback
workshops page shows event feed content
messages page loads without index/precondition errors
ware check-in page loads without check-in/index errors
ware check-in optional sections stay collapsed by default and preserve values
advanced diagnostics panel renders
theme contrast sweep (light)
theme contrast sweep (dark)
theme contrast sweep (mono)
